titleStmt.title: SII 38.136: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 136. (A.R. No. 136 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north base, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription is slightly damaged. It begins with the meykīrtti of the king Vīramē tuṇaiyāgavum. It records that an official Jayasiṅgakulakāla Viḻupparaiyar of Kurukāḍi in Kiḻār-kūṟṟam in Nittavinōda-vaḷanāḍu in Chōḻa-maṇḍalam having been present at Vākkāṇikkum-maṇḍapa in the temple in Tiruvoṟṟiyūr which was in Puḻalnāḍu in Puḻar-kōṭṭam, ordered the assignment of 120 kāśu, remitted by the sāliyanagarttār, who settled in the locality Jayasiṅgakulakāla-pperunteru, which they bought from the nagarattār of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr and karma-kiḻavar, for which they had to remit the above amount towards the payment of kaḍamai to the god of the Tiruvoṟṟiyūr temple. It is stated that this amount was to be utilized for conducting special service on the day of āyilayam, for the asterism of the ruler. The revenue officials, accountant, temple officials gave consent to this arrangement.

It further records that the revenue officials and accountants ordered the apportionment of ten kāśu which the weavers (sāliyanagarattār), who settled at (the street) Jayasiṅgakulakālap-perunteruvu, remitted every month for conducting special services to the god, Tiruvoṟṟiyūr-uḍaiyār, on the day of Āślēsha on which the king was born. It is also recorded that provision was also made for conducting various festivals for the Tiruvoṟṟiyūr-uḍaiyār, Subrahmaṇya, Kārāṇai-viṭaṅkadēva and goddess Tiruvottappiḍāriyār on different occasions every month and was also for distributing prasādam to the devotees and singers of Tiruppadiyam. This arrangement was also ordered to be engraved on stone as per the order of the official, Jayasiṅgakulakālaviḻupparaiyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śrī virametuṇaiyākavum tiyākameyaṇiyākavum ceṅkoloccik karuṅkalikaṭintu veṇkuṭainiḻal vijayaciṅkāsanattil viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī virarājentradevaṟkku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu Atikārikaḷ coḻamaṇṭalattu nittaviṉotavaḷanāṭṭuk kiḻār kūṟṟattu kurukāṭik kurukāṭukiḻāṉ kampanāṭṭu veḷār Atikārikaḷ jayaciṅkakulakāla viḻupparaiyar puḻaṟkoṭṭattu
p puḻalnāṭṭu tiruvoṟṟiyuruṭaiyār koyiliṉ muṉpil vakkāṇikkum maṇṭapattiruntu koyil karumamārāyaviruntu tiruvoṟṟiyūr nakarattārum karmakiḻavarkaḷup pakkal cāliyaṉ māṟaācaṉ cirāḷaṉ kai koṇṭa coḻat tilata māṇikkam kula veṇkāṭaṉāṭavalānāṉa cempiyaṉ coḻa māyilaṭṭiyum Ūraṉ cuṟṟiyāṉa Uyyakkoṇṭa coḻa māyilaṭṭiyum pe rāṉ ḻaṉum
cāliya nakarattār tiruvoṟṟiyūr nakarattārum karmakiḻavarkaḷum pakkal vilai koṇṭuṭaiya nilattil Eṟiṉa jayaciṅkakulakālap perun=teruvil cāliya nakarattār yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu mutal Āṇṭu varaiy Iṟukka kaṭava kācūRead kācunūṟ Aṟupatu Ivaṟṟuḷ Ittevar nilattāl maṉaiyiṟaikku Iṉnakarattār viṟṟuk kuṭutta lakṣaṇappaṭiyil Āṭṭāṇṭu Iṉnakarattārum karmakkiḻavarkaḷum tevarkku Iṟukka kaṭava kaṭamaikkuc ce
lavāka vaikkuṅ kācūRead kācunāṟpattu nikki kācu nūṟṟirupatum
śrī virame tuṇaiyākavum tiyākame Aṇiyākavum ceṅkoloccik karuṅkali kaṭintu veṇkuṭai niḻal vijaya ci nattil viṟṟindaruḷiya kovirājakesarippammarāna Uṭaiyār śrī virarā[je]ntra tevar tiruvavatāram ceytaruḷina Āyileyat tirunāḷil Utsavam ceytu nūṟṟeṭṭuk kalacamāṭiyaruḷi perun=tiruvamutu ceytaruḷiya tirttamāṭiyaruḷavum muṉai
yvataṟku nivan=tam ceyka veṉ(ṉ)ṟup puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷanāyakam Īkkāṭṭuk koṭṭattup puliyurnāṭṭu nelvāyil valampuri kiḻāṉ Aṭikaḷ kaṇavati pāṉ celvaṉ naṟ tāṉa muven=taveḷā muṉ ṉum Ulakamuṭaiyāṉum kiḻ l kirayam Aṟṟiya pukaḻ vā
maṭamuṭaiya catirānapaṇṭitaṉum śrīkāriyam Ariyalūruṭaiyāṉ civacaraṇaṉ ceṭṭiyāna coḻakula nārāṇayaṉRead nārāyaṇaṉmuven=taveḷāṇumRead muventaveḷāṉum mutalkaṇakku nūṟṟeṇ(m)maṉ Oruppa(ṭ)aip paṉaiyaṉum piṭārañ ceyyum poṟkoilpiṭārāṇum kālūn na piccaṉāna tiruvoṟṟiyurpiccaṉum cun=taraṉ Oṟṟiyāṉ poṟkoyil celvan cākaraṉ piṭāranum tiruvakkāṇipiccaṉum koyil naṭu
kampira vañcikaṉ comiśvarapiṭāraṉum Iruntu nimantañ ceytapaṭiy Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiyārkku kovirājakesaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār virarājentratevar tiruvavatāra ceytaruḷiṉa Āyileyat tirunāḷ tiṅkaḷ toṟum tiruviḻā Eḻuntaruḷi nūṟṟeṭṭuk kalacamāṭiyaruḷip perun tiruvamutu ceytaruḷuvataṟkum kkum tevaraṭiyārkkum tiruppatiyam pāṭuvānuḷḷiṭṭārkkum pracāta
(ta)ṅ kuṭukkavum veṇṭuvatukku jayaciṅkakulakālapperun=taruvil cāliyanakarattār tiṅkaḷāyileyan toṟum vaikkum kācu pattum Ikkācu pattum Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār tiṅkaḷ tiruviḻākkaḷ Eḻun=taruḷum potum Amāvācikaḷ toṟum cani pavaṉi Eḻun=taruḷi maṭattilum Uṭaiyārkku muṉpu tirukkoṭi piṭikka kaṭavārkaḷākavum piḷḷaiyār subrahmaṇya(ya) tiruviḻāvukku mācit tiruvi
ḻāvukkum paṅkuni Utsavat tiruviḻāvukkum vaikāci vicākat tiruviḻāvukkum tiruvaṭṭappiṟaipiṭāriyār tiruviḻāvukkum Uṭaiyār kārāṉaiviṭaṅkatevar tiruviḻāvukkum tuvaja Itukku ta pujai peṟak kaṭavārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi kallu veṭṭuvikka veṉṟu Atikārikaḷ jayaciṅkakulakāla viḻupparaiyar 7(1/4) kallu veṭṭittu .
Digital edition of SII 38.136 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
